summary: Pure metrics-sync PR: README status table and report.json were stale (4194/6800, 38.7%) relative to the session's gated wins (4258->4266 fn, 39.16->39.50% code). No source code changed.
decomp_lessons: README/report.json can drift from actual gated wins between sessions; re-running gen_decomp_report.py catches band_wins that were gated but not yet remeasured.
